metrics.name: academorix.payment.intents.created_total
metrics.description: Number of payment intents created.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.intents.cancelled_total
metrics.description: cancellation_reason_bucket = requested_by_customer / duplicate / fraudulent / abandoned / expired.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.intents.expired_total
metrics.description: ExpireStalePaymentIntentsJob nightly sweep count. Non-zero indicates abandoned checkouts.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.intents.3ds_challenge_triggered_total
metrics.description: reason: psd2_threshold / high_risk / forced_by_tenant / issuer_required.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.intents.3ds_challenge_outcome_total
metrics.description: outcome: authenticated / rejected / not_supported / bypassed / abandoned.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.intents.confirm_duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end ConfirmPaymentIntentJob latency. Provider-specific — Stripe typically < 500ms P99; PayPal < 2s; Custom Webhook varies.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.captured_total
metrics.description: The primary success metric. brand_bucket = card_major (visa/mc/amex) / card_other / bank / wallet / other.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.captured_amount_total_cents
metrics.description: Cumulative captured amount. Cross-tenant aggregation only — per-tenant amounts NEVER surfaced as labels (compliance).

metrics.name: academorix.payment.capture_duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end capture latency (intent create → payment row committed). Includes provider round-trip + observer atomic side effects.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.manual_capture_triggered_total
metrics.description: partial: true / false. Non-zero on 'true' indicates significant manual-capture use.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.methods.duplicate_detected_total
metrics.description: Non-zero indicates the fingerprint-based deduplication logic is preventing duplicate cards from being stored (working as intended).

metrics.name: academorix.payment.methods.active
metrics.description: Current count of active payment methods per (provider, method_type).

metrics.name: academorix.payment.disputes.opened_total
metrics.description: amount_bucket: low (<$100) / medium ($100-$500) / high ($500-$5000) / very_high (>$5000).

metrics.name: academorix.payment.disputes.closed_total
metrics.description: outcome: won / lost / accepted / warning_closed_without_dispute.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.disputes.escalated_to_chargeback_total
metrics.description: Every escalation is a paid conversion loss + a regulator-facing chargeback record.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.disputes.unresolved
metrics.description: Current count of unresolved disputes per provider.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.disputes.evidence_due_soon
metrics.description: Disputes with evidence_due_by within the next 7 days.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.circuit_breakers.opened_total
metrics.description: Every increment is a P1 signal. Should stay near 0 in a healthy system.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.circuit_breakers.currently_open
metrics.description: Current count of open circuit-breakers per provider across all tenants.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.webhooks.received_total
metrics.description: signature_valid = 'true' / 'false'. Non-zero on 'false' indicates potential attack or misconfigured signing secret.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.reconcile.drift_count
metrics.description: ReconcilePaymentIntentsJob finding count per run. Should stay near 0 in a healthy system.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: academorix.payment.fraud.review_queued_total
metrics.description: Payments with risk_level IN ('elevated', 'highest') routed to fraud review.
